formulas.formula: Set(varDispatcherEmail, User().Email); Set(varDefaultRadiusMiles, 25); Set(varPendingApprovalCount, CountRows(Filter('TicketApprovals', ApproverEmail = varDispatcherEmail && ApprovalStatus = "Pending")))
Filter(If(ctxStatusFilter = "All", 'ServiceTickets', Filter('ServiceTickets', Status = ctxStatusFilter)), ctxSearchText = "" || StartsWith(Lower(Title), Lower(ctxSearchText)))

Patch('TicketApprovals', Defaults('TicketApprovals'), {TicketID: varSelectedTicket.ID, TitleSnapshot: varSelectedTicket.Title, RequestedBy: varDispatcherEmail, ApproverEmail: "lead@contoso.com", ApprovalStatus: "Pending", RequestComments: txt_ApprovalReason.Text})
If(ctxQueueScope = "All", Filter('TicketApprovals', ApprovalStatus = "Pending"), Filter('TicketApprovals', ApproverEmail = varDispatcherEmail && ApprovalStatus = "Pending"))

Patch('TicketApprovals', varSelectedApproval, {ApprovalStatus: "Approved", ReviewedOn: Now(), RequestComments: txt_ReviewNote.Text}); Patch('ServiceTickets', LookUp('ServiceTickets', ID = varSelectedApproval.TicketID), {Status: "Scheduled"}); Set(varPendingApprovalCount, CountRows(Filter('TicketApprovals', ApproverEmail = varDispatcherEmail && ApprovalStatus = "Pending"))); Navigate(ApprovalQueueScreen, ScreenTransition.Cover)

Patch('TicketApprovals', varSelectedApproval, {ApprovalStatus: "Rejected", ReviewedOn: Now(), RequestComments: txt_ReviewNote.Text}); Set(varPendingApprovalCount, CountRows(Filter('TicketApprovals', ApproverEmail = varDispatcherEmail && ApprovalStatus = "Pending"))); Navigate(ApprovalQueueScreen, ScreenTransition.Cover)
